name: Brunswick Community College
description: Brunswick Community College is a place to play pickleball in Bolivia, NC. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Cape Fear National Golf Course at Brunswick Forest
description: Cape Fear National Golf Course at Brunswick Forest is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Leland, NC. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Carolina Pickleball Company
description: Private club that is open to new members.

name: Carolina Shores Park
description: Come play pickleball at Carolina Shores Park in Calabash, NC! There are 2 outdoor concrete and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.
open_play_schedule: 1st come first serve. If courts are full & people are waiting, play 1 game to 11 ( win by 2) & rotate off.

name: Carolina Shores POA
description: Private courts for Carolina Shores POA members only. Locked gates with POA members access only.

name: Compass Pointe
description: Compass Pointe is a place to play pickleball in Leland, NC. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Del Webb at Mallory Creek
description: Come play pickleball at Del Webb at Mallory Creek in Leland, NC! There are 5 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.

name: Fitness & Wellness Center at Brunswick Forest
description: Fitness & Wellness Center at Brunswick Forest is a place to play pickleball in Leland, NC. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. Reservations are available.

name: Greg Rymer Memorial Pickleball Courts
description: These are private courts for Sport or Golf members at the Clubs at St James only.  Please remove this listing from your website.  We have been having instances where local residents are coming out thinking they have a reserved court.

name: Holden Beach Pickleball
description: Holden Beach Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Supply, NC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: House of Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at House of Pickleball in Leland, NC! There are 12 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons.

name: Magnolia Greens
description: Magnolia Greens is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Leland, NC. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. Players have access to lights.

name: Middleton Park Tennis Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Middleton Park Tennis Courts in Oak Island, NC! There are 12 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Ocean Isle Beach Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Ocean Isle Beach Pickleball Courts in Ocean Isle Beach, NC! There are 6 outdoor asphalt and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: While there isn't an organized open play, many people tend to show up around 8 AM and 5 PM for open play.

name: Sea Trail Plantation
description: Come play pickleball at Sea Trail Plantation in Sunset Beach, NC! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Shallotte District Park
description: Shallotte District Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Shallotte, NC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

name: Smithville Township District Park
description: Shaded pavilion with picnic tables.

name: St James Plantation - The SeaSide Club
description: St James Plantation - The SeaSide Club is a place to play pickleball in Southport, NC. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are private.

name: Waterford of the Carolinas
description: Come play pickleball at Waterford of the Carolinas in Leland, NC! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.

name: Winding River Plantation
description: THESE COURTS ARE PRIVATE open only to residents of Winding River
